methods.description: Process for collecting and initially screening plant species for study.

steps.description: In the initial 1986 screening process three or four plants from each of 20 species collections were studied, but plants were not preserved at the end of the growing season.

methods.description: Process for collecting seeds and growing plants for further study.

steps.description: In 1987, the remaining seed from the original collection of Ac. 81.2 provided two additional plants.
In 1988, open-pollinated seed from two of the original field-grown plants were started in the greenhouse and later moved to trellises in the field.

methods.description: Preparation and examination of flower buds for microscopic analysis.

steps.description: Flower buds collected between 8:00 and 10:00 AM were prepared for microscopic examination by fixation in Carnoy's solution (3 ethyl alcohol : 1 glacial acetic acid) for 24 hr.
steps.searchable_summary: fix flower buds in Carnoy's solution for microscopy

steps.description: Observations of sporads at the tetrad stage of PMCs were made with special attention paid to frequencies of dyads.

methods.description: Study of pollen grains for size and staining characteristics.

steps.description: Plower buds for pollen studies were collected on the day before anthesis and held overnight at room temperature with pedicels in water.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and store flower buds for pollen studies

steps.description: The number of stained and nonstained pollen grains following treatment with aceto-carmine were recorded along with frequencies of normal size and large (unreduced) grams.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze pollen grains for staining and size

steps.description: Pollen size measurements (in millimeters) were obtained from diploid I. trifida (x), tetraploid Ac. 81.2 (2x), hexaploid sweetpotato (3x), and nonreduced pollen of Ac. 81.2 (4x).
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen size from different ploidy levels

methods.description: Process for performing controlled crosses under greenhouse conditions.

steps.description: Controlled crosses were made under greenhouse conditions with flowers emasculated between 3:00 and 5:00 PM and pollinated between 8:00 and 10:00 AM the following morning.
Seed were harvested as they matured.
